title: 🏦 Loan System Guide
footer: Veyra • Loans Help • Tip: Debt is temporary, screenshots are forever

pages.title: 🏦 Loans Overview
pages.description:
Veyra loans are a **controlled boost**: you borrow coin now, repay later, and your choices affect your **credit score**.

Loans are meant to help progression, not enable scam empires (yes, I’m looking at you).

fields.name: What Loans Do
fields.value:
✅ Get instant gold for upgrades, gear, trade
✅ Unlock bigger loans with good repayment
❌ Default and your credit score gets cooked

fields.name: Main Commands
fields.value:
• `/loan` - take starter loan (one-time)
• `!repayloan` - repay your active loan

pages.title: 📜 Core Rules (Very important)
pages.description: Loans are **strict**. Veyra is not running a charity stream.

fields.name: 1 Active Loan Limit
fields.value: You can only have **ONE active loan** at a time.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.value:
Every loan has a **term** (days).
When issued, you get a **due date**.
Pay before due date to stay clean.

fields.name: Default = Consequences
fields.value:
If you default:
• credit score drops hard
• you can get **locked out of loans**
• Veyra becomes… less polite 😇

pages.title: 🟡 Starter Loan (How it works)
pages.description:
This is the beginner-friendly loan. One-time offer.
It teaches you the system without ruining your life.

fields.name: How to Claim
fields.value:
1) Run `/loan`
2) Read terms
3) Press **Accept Terms**
4) Type **CONFIRM** (exactly)

Then the gold is credited instantly.

fields.name: Important
fields.value: This loan offer is one time its used to set your credit score.

pages.title: 💰 Repayment (Pay up, hero)
pages.description: Repayment is simple. No essays. No paperwork. Just money.

fields.name: What Happens
fields.value:
• Veyra checks if you have an **active loan**
• removes repayment gold from your wallet
• loan status becomes **paid** ✅

fields.name: Not Enough Gold?
fields.value:
If you don’t have enough, the Veyra tells you.
No payment = no forgiveness.
You’re not in a Netflix redemption arc.

pages.title: 📬 Reminder DMs (Veyra remembers everything)
pages.description:
If your loan is due soon, she can DM you.
If your dms are disabled you won't get reminder

fields.name: Reminder Window
fields.value: A reminder DM is sent if your loan is due within **2 days**.

fields.name: DM Includes
fields.value:
• loan name + pack
• time left (Discord relative time)
• due date
• repayment hint: `!repayloan`

pages.title: 🧠 How to Use Loans Like a Smart Villain
pages.description: Loans are leverage. Use them like a merchant, not like a gambling addict.

fields.name: Good Uses
fields.value:
✅ buy tools/gear that increase income
✅ invest in production upgrades
✅ restock items for quests

fields.name: Bad Uses
fields.value:
❌ gambling it all
❌ giving it away to friends
❌ impulse buying shiny nonsense

(You know who you are.)

fields.name: Rule of Thumb
fields.value: If the loan doesn’t help you earn **more than repayment**, you’re just renting dopamine.
